canonical_definition: A synthetic football game comments dataset designed for text-to-table tasks, featuring multi-instance and dynamic data where team statistics are aggregated from individual player scores mentioned in the text.
papers: MAPoRL: Multi-Agent Post-Co-Training for Collaborative Large Language Models with Reinforcement Learning
On Synthesizing Data for Context Attribution in Question Answering

definitions.paper: On Synthesizing Data for Context Attribution in Question Answering
